creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 209538
libmysofa.diff

It is now needed by audio/openal-soft.  Let's keep it up to date.

I removed the test patches since we can also fix them by creating a single
symlink.  Let me know if this is fine with you or if you'd rather keep the
patches.

Poudriere builds (+ make test) pass on 12.0 amd64, 11.3 i386.  Local
build+test was fine on 13.0 amd64 too.
